## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## UI Changes

Add screenshots or screen recordings for visible changes.

For every new or modified visual component:

- [ ] Verified at mobile width (360px)
- [ ] Verified at tablet width (768px)
- [ ] Verified at desktop width (1280px)
- [ ] No unintended horizontal scrolling or clipped content
- [ ] Keyboard, touch, and pointer interactions remain usable
- [ ] Added or updated responsive Playwright coverage where regression risk warrants it

Attach mobile, tablet, and desktop screenshots or recordings, or mark this section not applicable with a reason.

## Risk Notes

Call out migrations, breaking changes, security considerations, or follow-up work.
